# Detect Helper Boundary

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/provideradapteracldocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to adapter ACL](../adapter-acl.md)

`internal/agentbridge/detectutil` is the shared detection helper for concrete provider adapters. Env override is a pin, not a hint: if the override path is absent or not a regular file, detection fails closed and does not fall back to PATH.

1. Override path candidate when `RIIDO_<PROVIDER>_PATH` is set.
2. Process `PATH` candidates when no override exists.
3. Login-shell `PATH` candidates read once per process with timeout.
4. Well-known install directory candidates.

`ResolveExecutableCandidates` returns no-override candidates in PATH order. Concrete adapters decide whether to probe one or several candidates. `RIIDO_OPENCLAW_PATH` remains a pin even when the pinned executable is too old or invalid.

Detect-selected executable path is capability snapshot execution evidence. `bridge.Run` and `runtimeactor.Submit` pass it into `StartRequest.Executable`; concrete provider adapters must not reinterpret it from PATH.
